original_abstract: This comprehensively revised and updated edition of *International Organization* offers a rigorous introduction to the study of global institutions within the field of International Relations. Tailored specifically for students navigating this complex landscape, the text provides a foundational framework for understanding how international organizations shape global governance and policy.
humanized_abstract: This 4th Edition of International Organization provides a thorough update of a successful text that offers students of International Relations a thorough examination of international institutions. Written for the student who is beginning to grapple with the complexities of international relations, International Organization provides a conceptual framework for examining the role of international organizations in international politics and their effect on public policy.
